name: hoc-cloud-labs
description: Static server for cloud/devops learning labs

scripts.build:server: pnpm run gen:server-data && esbuild server/server.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist-server/server.bundle.js --alias:ssh2=./server/stubs/ssh2-stub.js --alias:cpu-features=./server/stubs/empty-stub.js --banner:js="import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.gen:content: node scripts/fixtures-to-ts.mjs && node scripts/generate-labs-index.mjs && node scripts/generate-search-index.mjs
